Upcoming Events

Categories
  • Home |
  • Events |

Denver’s Biggest, Brightest Events

These are the moments that move you — the music under the stars, the roar of the crowd, the buzz of something unforgettable. From festivals and cultural celebrations to can’t-miss games and unforgettable concerts, Denver’s top events light up the calendar and inspire visitors to turn a day out into a weekend away. They’re not just big — they’re worth the trip.

Hosting an Event?

Get it on the radar. Anyone can submit an event to be featured on our Denver365 calendar — the go-to source for what’s happening around the city.

Submit Your Event
May 02

Cinco de Mayo Festival

  • Civic Center Park
  • Recurring daily

Join us for an unforgettable celebration at the largest and longest-standing regional Cinco de Mayo festival in Colorado! Immerse yourself in the…

  • Denver Pavilions
  • Recurring daily

Denver Colfax Marathon

  • City Park
  • Recurring daily

There is a distance for your goal! Aim high and go for Denver’s only Marathon, go on your personal safari with 1 mile of the Half Marathon going…

  • Colorado Convention Center
  • Recurring daily

Get ready for a star-spangled showdown as the Colorado Rockies take on the San Francisco Giants at Coors Field this Independence Day weekend. On…

Always Something Going On

Looking for the best of what’s happening now — or what’s coming up next? From weekend picks and Red Rocks Amphitheatre shows to annual favorites and blockbuster concerts, these highlights are your go-to guides for what’s big, buzz-worthy and totally Denver.

Event Calendar

Fall in Love with Red Rocks

Biggest Concerts

Must-See Art & Exhibitions

Vibrant. Local. Unforgettable.

From street fairs to film festivals, parades to cultural traditions, Denver brings people together in vibrant, unforgettable ways. These festivals light up the calendar with music, art, flavor and community — each one a chance to experience the Mile High City’s creative spirit firsthand.

Explore Arts & Culture More Events
Apr 25

Women+Film Festival

  • Sie FilmCenter
  • Recurring daily

Women+Film Festival is a live event screening over a dozen of outstanding features, shorts, and documentaries celebrating female filmmakers behind the…

Read More about Women+Film Festival
Apr 26

Mile High Asian Food Week

  • Recurring daily

Mark your calendars! Mile High Asian Food Week (MHAFW) returns April 26-May 3, 2026—with an extra day! Now in its fourth year, this week-long…

Read More about Mile High Asian Food Week

SeriesFest: Season 12

  • Recurring daily

SeriesFest is an award-winning festival dedicated to showcasing the best and boldest in episodic storytelling from around the world. At a time when…

Soundtrack of the City

From legendary venues like Red Rocks Amphitheatre to block-party festivals and intimate club shows, Denver hits every note. These standout concerts and can't-miss music moments bring the beat all year long — so if live music moves you, this is your stage.
